efficientnet.name: EfficientNetB0 (Spatial Baseline)
efficientnet.description: Baseline spatial model using depthwise separable convolutions to extract frame-level features with a highly efficient parameter footprint.

xception.name: Xception (Spatial Optimized)
xception.description: Optimized spatial network incorporating depthwise separable convolutions and residual connections, capturing micro-texture facial anomalies.

hybrid.name: Hybrid ResNet50 + Bi-LSTM (Spatio-Temporal Flagship)
hybrid.description: Flagship model combining a deep ResNet50 feature extractor with a Bidirectional LSTM temporal network to track inter-frame jitter, blending anomalies, and consistency over time.
